items.title: Garrison Orthodontics (live domain) footer shows the credit

items.evidence: curl HTTP 200, 1 match for 'Powered by Alloro'; DB check confirmed 91a29a43... footer ILIKE '%Powered by Alloro%' = false

items.title: San Diego Center For Endodontics footer shows the credit
items.evidence: sdcendo.com currently 301-redirects to an external WordPress.com staging domain (DNS not pointed at the Alloro renderer) so the public domain itself could not be used for visual verification. Verified instead via the project's Alloro subdomain swift-smile-7240.sites.getalloro.com. Initial request showed no credit due to a stale Redis render cache; busted via the renderer's existing ?nocache=1 param, then confirmed the credit persists on a subsequent plain request. DB column confirmed correct independent of caching.

items.title: Excluded projects confirmed untouched
items.precondition: Final full-sweep DB query across all 14 known projects
steps: 1. SELECT footer ILIKE '%Powered by Alloro%' for all 14 project IDs
2. Confirm getalloro.com (acc7cbfc...), internal demo (4e0ee175...), and undomained Garrison duplicate (91a29a43...) all show NO_CREDIT
3. Confirm the other 11 (10 newly edited + One Endodontics) show HAS_CREDIT
items.expected: Exactly 11 HAS_CREDIT, 3 NO_CREDIT, matching the spec's in-scope/excluded list precisely
items.evidence: Final sweep query returned exactly this split with correct project IDs on each side
